series_metadata.series_title: Motorcycle Ohio Program (MOP) class paperwork/ fiscal
series_metadata.series_description: MOP0010 (11/12): “Student Signature Rosters”; MOP0017 (11/12): “Basic Rider Course Skills Evaluation Score Sheets”; MOP0028 (02/05): “Motorcycle Ohio Student Report Form”; MOP0032 (12/10) “BRC/ERC Instructor Check off List”; MOP0036 (02/13): “Motorcycle Safety Course Waiver and Indemnification”; MOP0039 (11/12): Course Satisfaction Survey”; MOP0058 (01/09): “Instructor Noon-Crash Report”; MOP0062 (12/12): “BRC Individual Skill Evaluation Sheet”; MOP0065 (03/13): “Motorcycle Ohio Incident Report Form”; MOP0066 (03/13): “Waiver and Release for participants with Medical Condition”; Inactive Instructor files; Purchase orders; Contracts; Refunds; Reciprocities: Grantee invoices; Class paperwork; Federal grant invoices; Employees sign-in sheet and Phone logs.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Return current fiscal year two (2) years. ; Electronic: Return current fiscal year two (2) years
